_logger.LogError(
    ex,
    "DIA Dataverse staging save failed after {MaxAttempts} attempts for file {FileName}. Error: {ErrorMessage}.",
    maxAttempts,
    filename,
    ex.Message);


dotnet build WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.sln

git add WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services/Services/DiaIngestionProcessingService.cs
git commit -m "SPESTG-480 add Dataverse staging diagnostic logs"
git push origin users/alex/SPESTG-480-dia-exception-handling
